ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "time" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the data point */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the market */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the market */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the market */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the market */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume of the market */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the data was collected */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency of the market data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO 4217 currency code */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of data feed (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, file, database) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feed_market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feed-market data relationship */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_market_data_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feed_market_data_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, risk manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., trading, research, risk management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_requests" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., historical, real-time) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_requests_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_versions" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the market data */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_versions_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., market event, trend alert) */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_time" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the publication */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_comments" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment made by the user */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_comments_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_ratings" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_time" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_ratings_market_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
